error.entity_not_found: Entity not found. Make sure the Sun integration is configured.

user.title: Entity Selection
user.description:
Select the entities for your pergola bioclimatique setup.

Sun integration status: **{sun_status}**

data_description.pv_power_entity: Optional. At least one of PV power or light sensor is recommended for cloud detection.
data_description.light_sensor_entity: Optional. Used as alternative to PV power for cloud detection.
data_description.humidity_entity: Optional. Blocks automation when humidity exceeds threshold.
data_description.priority_lock_entity: Optional. Monitors safety locks (rain, temperature, security).
data_description.priority_lock_timer_entity: Optional. Timer for safety lock duration.

geometry.title: Geometry Parameters
geometry.description: Configure the physical geometry of your pergola.

data_description.max_opening_angle: Maximum tilt angle of the blades in degrees.
data_description.calibration_offset: Permanent correction offset for blade angle.
data_description.summer_safety_margin: Extra margin added in summer mode for better shading.

data_description.update_interval: How often the control loop runs.
data_description.step_size: Position is rounded to multiples of this value to reduce mechanical wear.
data_description.deadband: Minimum position change required to trigger movement.
data_description.cloudy_target: Default position when cloudy or in standby.
data_description.min_useful_percent: Below this position, switch to standby instead.
data_description.humidity_max: Automation is blocked when humidity exceeds this value.
data_description.min_elevation: Automation is inactive when sun is below this elevation.
data_description.calibration_elevation: Sun elevation that triggers morning calibration.

cloud_detection.title: Cloud Detection Parameters
cloud_detection.description: Configure sun/cloud detection using your power or light sensor.

data_description.pv_max_watts: Peak power output of your PV sensor under ideal conditions.
data_description.pv_sunny_ratio: Fraction of theoretical max power that indicates direct sun.
data_description.pv_smooth_alpha: Weight of new readings vs. history (higher = more reactive).
data_description.hysteresis_duration: Minimum time before switching between sunny/cloudy state.
